title: More Compatibility Variants (Biomes o' Plenty)
description: Adding compatibility for Biomes o' Plenty wood types to More Variants Mods. This is NOT an expansion, it simply resolves a crafting issue between these mods and BoP.
body:
# More Compatibility Variants ([Biomes o' Plenty](https://modrinth.com/mod/biomes-o-plenty))
If you've tried to use [Biomes o' Plenty](https://modrinth.com/mod/biomes-o-plenty) with any of [LieOnLion](https://modrinth.com/organization/lieon-studios)'s _More Variants_ mods, you've probably noticed that you can't craft the things you want with the Bo'P woods.

![crafting failed](https://uwu.catgirl.host/i/0neh6.webp)  
<sup>Using Bo'P Redwood with [More Crafting Tables](https://modrinth.com/mod/more-crafting-tables-lieonlion) results in sadness...</sup>

This mod resolves the problem by making sure that you can still craft the vanilla recipes with Bo'P woods even if you have the cool variants.

It doesn't add any new textures, but you won't be stuck without a crafting table in the middle of a redwood forest anymore!

![crafting success](https://uwu.catgirl.host/i/rk6nq.webp)  
<sup>...but not with this mod!</sup>

It works with all of [LieOnLion](https://modrinth.com/user/LieOnLion)'s and [Pnku](https://modrinth.com/user/pnku)'s "vanilla"¹ mods including [More Stick Variants](https://modrinth.com/mod/more-stick-variants) and also [Nemo's Campfires](https://modrinth.com/mod/nemos-campfires). Visit [pnku.de](https://www.pnku.de) for a complete list.

¹: [More Feeding Trough Variants](https://modrinth.com/mod/more-feeding-trough-variants) and [More Nemo's Woodcutter Variants](https://modrinth.com/mod/more-nemos-woodcutter-variants) are not included.


**Why was this needed?**  
If you have eg. [More Chest Variants](https://modrinth.com/mod/more-chest-variants-lieonlion), you can't craft a chest from planks added by [Biomes o' Plenty](https://modrinth.com/mod/biomes-o-plenty). You just can't. Similarly, you can't craft, say, a jacaranda fence with [More Stick Variants](https://modrinth.com/mod/more-stick-variants).
With this you can craft the "basic" version of all things you'd expect to craft from Bo'P's wood.

**Do I _need_ all those mods installed? I just want nicer chests and barrels...**  
No, you can pick and choose whichever Variant mod you want.

**Ok, but will it break [LieOnLion's own Bo'P chest mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/mcv-biomes-o-plenty)?!**  
Nope, it'll work just fine when Lion updates it to 1.20.4+ on Fabric.
